Name: Nola - Off site at Mutts With Manners
Kennel_Card_Website_Memo: If resilience had a name, it would be Nola. First arriving as a stray puppy in late 2024, Nola had a rocky start through no fault of her own. But after spending time in the Mutts with Manners program at North Point Training Center, she has completely transformed into an incredible, highly skilled companion. Affectionate & Loyal: Nola is fiercely devoted to her people, loves kid-approved family time, and thrives on give-and-receive affection. Playful & Quirky: At just 2 years old, she’s past the destructive puppy chewing stage, but still full of playful energy, goofy quirks, and fun. Highly Trained: Thanks to her time living 24/7 with handlers, she has great house manners, is fully housebroken, and walks beautifully on a leash. She will do best in a home with a predictable routine, plenty of companionship, and a family ready to shower her with the love and stability she deserves. In return, you’ll get a brilliant, goofball best friend who will never leave your side!
Dog_Attributes: Affectionate, Good with Kids, Playful, Quirky, Separation Anxiety, Active, Friendly, Housebroken

Name: Noopy - Off Site, Mutts with Manners
Kennel_Card_Website_Memo: Looking for a dog who's handsome, enthusiastic, and fun as heck? Meet Noopy, your future best friend! Noopy is a little over two years old and weighs about 60 pounds—right at the top end of medium-sized, with the heart of a lap dog. (And yes, he will try to sit on your lap!) This pibble mix is full of personality and charm, with a striking coat and bright, expressive eyes that sparkle with curiosity and excitement. He’s always up for an adventure—walks, hikes, backyard zoomies, or anything involving toys and attention. He pulls on the leash a bit, but it’s just because he’s so excited to be out and about. With a bit of guidance and consistency, Giles is well on his way to being the best boy. Noopy already has the good boy genes—he just needs a little help turning them into good boy manners. And he's gonna learn all that at Mutts with Manners! Apply here: https://www.dbchs.org/muttswithmannersdogs

Name: Noodlez
Kennel_Card_Website_Memo: Hi! I'm Noodlez! I am a sweetie pie and snuggle bug! I also have a submissive playstyle, but I get along with any dog that I have met! I would thrive in a home with a dog who exudes confidence so I can learn to be confident too! I am a handsome pup who is well behaved, and they are working me closer to being potty trained! I could certainly learn the schedule that works best for you!
Dog_Attributes: Active, Affectionate, Cuddly, Friendly, Gentle, Playful, Quirky, Shy

Name: Roni - Adoption Fee Sponsored
Kennel_Card_Website_Memo: Roni is a handsome 2-year-old hound mix with a happy spirit and a personality that wins people over everywhere he goes. He loves attention and is always ready to greet new friends with that bright smile of his. Roni has already proven himself to be quite the social guy. He’s done wonderfully meeting kids during school field trips, enjoys Doggie Day Out adventures, and even handles busy coffee shops like a pro. Whether he’s out exploring or simply soaking up attention from everyone around him, Roni takes it all in stride. Inside his kennel, Roni may try to impress you with his world-class parkour skills — he just gets a little excited showing off! Once he’s out and spending time with people, his easygoing and charming personality really shines.
Dog_Attributes: Affectionate, Cuddly, Friendly, Housebroken, Meet and greet required, Playful, Shy

Name: Sully - Adoption Fee Sponsored
Kennel_Card_Website_Memo: Meet Sully! Sully is a handsome 3-year-old with a smile so big it’s impossible not to smile back. The moment he sees a friendly face, that famous grin appears and his whole body lights up with excitement. This playful boy still has plenty of youthful energy and loves being part of the fun. Whether he’s greeting visitors with happy wiggles or leaning in for some well-earned pets, Sully’s joyful personality shines through in everything he does. If you’re looking for a fun-loving, handsome dog with a heart full of loyalty and a smile that can brighten your whole day, Sully is ready to meet you.
Dog_Attributes: Kids 13+, Active, Adult-Only Home Preferred, Affectionate, Friendly, Gentle, Meet and greet required, Playful

Name: Axel - Adoption Fee Sponsored
Kennel_Card_Website_Memo: Axel Personality: Healthy, happy, fiercely loyal, and super smart! Skills: Knows sit, down, shake, beg, roll over, and walks great with a routine. Favorite Things: Playgroups (bounces like a bunny!), showing off tricks for treats, and lounging in the office. Needs: A family who appreciates a brainy dog and can offer a predictable routine. Bonus: Fully vetted, neutered, and sponsored by Billy's BBQ—he’s ready to head home today!

Name: Onix off-site at Mutts with Manners
Kennel_Card_Website_Memo: Hi! I’m Onix, and enthusiasm is kind of my thing! I’m a playful young girl with endless puppy energy and a joyful spirit. I get very excited during playtime and am still learning to slow down, but I’m eager to learn and ready for adventure. Speaking of learning, I'm at Mutts with Manners to hone my skills!

Name: Oreo - off-site at Mutts with Manners
Kennel_Card_Website_Memo: Hi, I’m Mustard! I’m a sleek black-and-white Terrier / American Pit Bull mix with lots of playful, puppy energy still left in me. I may look calm and relaxed in my kennel, but once I’m outside and with my people, my fun-loving personality really comes to life! I love to play and can get a little mouthy when I get excited, so I’ll do best with a family who’s ready to help me keep working on my manners. The good news? I’m very food-motivated, which makes training fun, rewarding, and a great way for us to bond. If you’re looking for a happy, energetic girl who’s ready for playtime, learning, and lots of love, I might be the perfect match for you!

Name: Elias
Kennel_Card_Website_Memo: Hi, I’m Elias! I’m a 4-year-old medium mixed-breed with a gorgeous coat—black and brown with a white, speckled chest. I’m very friendly and sweet and love people. I’m still working on my manners and can get excited and jump up, so I may need some guidance around smaller children. With time, patience, and consistency, I’ll do great and continue to improve.

Name: Janet
Kennel_Card_Website_Memo: Janet is a beautiful all-black Lab mix who is proven to be a sweet girl. She does have separation anxiety and needs someone to work through those feelings with her. The best way to meet Janet is outside the kennel where she can relax and show her personality. Stop by, take her for a walk, and see if she might be the companion you’ve been looking for.

Name: Socks
Kennel_Card_Website_Memo: Meet Socks! This tall, beautiful 1.5-year-old girl is an absolute gem who is rapidly coming out of her shell and showing off her amazing personality. While she can start off a tad timid, her sweet, playful nature shines through the moment she gets outside! Why You’ll Love Her: Yard Enthusiast: Running around in the yard and getting a few tasty treats are the fast tracks to Socks’ heart. Great with Kids: Socks is gentle and does wonderfully with children! A True "Dog’s Dog": Socks loves canine companions. She would thrive most in a home with a settled, confident resident dog to show her the ropes and be her built-in best friend. Ideal Home: Socks is looking for a family with a yard to zoom in, some kiddos to love, and a doggy sibling to guide her as she continues to blossom. If you have a friendly dog at home looking for a playful sister, Socks is your girl!
Dog_Attributes: No Cats, No chickens, Not Good with Cats, Good with Kids, Friendly

Name: Butcher
Kennel_Card_Website_Memo: Don’t let the kennel act fool you, he's a lover, not a fighter. Give him a few treats, a little patience, and a calm introduction, and you’ll quickly meet the real Butcher: a friendly, affectionate boy who genuinely wants connection. Once he realizes you’re a friend, his sweet personality shines through.
Dog_Attributes: Active, Friendly, Playful, Quirky, Meet and greet required

Name: Blondie
Kennel_Card_Website_Memo: Meet Blondie! 🐾 Great Pyrenees Mix Blondie is 65 pounds of pure, adorable sweetness! She has been with us since May, waiting for a family to call her own. According to our resident 10-year-old expert, Blondie is "such a good girl!" She is fantastic with young kids, takes treats amazingly gently, and lives for affection. With her gorgeous blond coat and gentle heart, she is the ultimate family dog. Come say hi to Blondie and see for yourself just how wonderful she is!
Dog_Attributes: No Cats, Friendly, Gentle, Good with Kids, No chickens, Playful, Quirky

Name: Stone
Kennel_Card_Website_Memo: In Foster (Ready for Adoption!) Good with Kids? Loves them—a certified cuddle champion! Stone is a gorgeous brindle boy who is currently living his best life in a foster home—and his foster mom can’t stop raving about him! She calls him "the greatest dog," and he has quickly become a beloved part of the family. Ultimate Cuddle Bug: Stone bonded instantly with the kids in his foster home. His favorite activity? Joining in on big family cuddle piles and taking cozy naps with the kiddos. Easygoing Vibe: At 2 years old and 55 pounds, he’s at that perfect age where he's fun, affectionate, and ready to settle right into a routine. Home-Tested: Being in a foster home means he's already getting a head start on home manners and home life! Stone mainly chooses to ignore cats, but he doesn't appreciate being hissed at or reacted to negatively (and can nip if challenged by a spicy kitty). He will do best in a home without cats, or with very dog-savvy, calm cats that won't confront him.

Name: Foffee
Kennel_Card_Website_Memo: Foffee A Heart of Gold: She might take a quick second to warm up, but once you're in her inner circle, you have a devoted friend for life. Goofy & Adorable: Foffee has a fun, silly personality that perfectly matches her cute-as-a-button look! The Perfect Size: At a compact 50 pounds, she’s the ideal size for cuddle sessions, car rides, and backyard play. Foffee is looking for a family who will give her just a little bit of time to settle in and show her big, beautiful heart. In return, you’ll get a loyal, vibrant sidekick who will bring endless smiles and goofiness to your home!

Name: Oak
Kennel_Card_Website_Memo: Meet Oak! Don't let my kennel manners fool you- once I'm outside I am an active explorer! I love to investigate EVERYTHING, follow my nose and take the world at a fun and fast pace. My superpowers? - Mega Ears: Perfect for listening for treat bags being opened. - Super Sniffer: My nose can track down even the most expertly hidden treats.

Name: Jon Bon Chonky
Kennel_Card_Website_Memo: Hello, I'm Chonky, the chonkster, or the chonkiest. I'm a handsome tan boy with a big ole head and an even bigger personality. I am currently looking for a family to call my own. My perfect day would be 1. hanging out with kids 2. eating delicious snacks 3. getting some good head scratches.
Dog_Attributes: Affectionate, Friendly, Good with Kids, Playful

Name: Georgie Harrison
Kennel_Card_Website_Memo: Currently I am overwhelmed in the shelter, I am a sweet boy, who is just scared in my current situation.

Name: Paul McCartney
Kennel_Card_Website_Memo: I really want to be friends, I'm just very nervous. I'm looking for someone who has the patience to show me not everything is scary.
